description: Vertical graphic co-branded with Daily Wire+. The top half is a torn-paper, off-white textured background carrying the black 'DAILY WIRE +' wordmark (with a small red plus sign) above a thin red rule reading 'EXCLUSIVE', followed by the serif headline 'ICE's Most Heroic Moments Of 2025' and a bold quote: '"Officers show up knowing the risks they face, and they choose to serve anyway."' The bottom half, separated by a ragged torn-paper edge, is a color-graded nighttime photograph in blue and purple light: a masked officer in body armor wearing a vest marked 'POLICE' walks beside a handcuffed man (hands cuffed behind his back, gray jacket, jeans, ball cap) along a road past SUVs with flashing red and blue lights, with other officers in the background.
notable_text: DAILY WIRE + ; EXCLUSIVE; ICE's Most Heroic Moments Of 2025; "Officers show up knowing the risks they face — and they choose to serve anyway."
